name: Payment 1 Loans - Midwest City
description_short: Payment 1 Financial offers personal installment loans and title loans to Midwest City residents, with flexible terms, competitive rates, and same-day funding for amounts typically $1K–$50K.
description_long:
Payment 1 Financial opened in Midwest City, Oklahoma in May 2021 and operates from a physical branch at 249 N Douglas Blvd. The company serves the local community with in-person and online lending options, positioning itself as a personalized alternative to traditional bank lending. They operate Monday–Friday 9:00 AM–6:00 PM and Saturday 9:00 AM–1:00 PM, with direct phone and email support.

Payment 1 offers two primary products: Personal Installment Loans for unexpected expenses, home repairs, emergencies, and general financial needs; and Title Loans, which allow borrowers to use vehicle equity as collateral while retaining driving privileges. Both products emphasize flexible payment schedules, competitive rates, and quick approval timelines. The company advertises same-day or next-day funding via check or direct debit card deposit. They also market credit-building benefits through on-time installment repayment.

The company distinguishes itself through local branch accessibility, personalized service (claiming to "tailor" solutions to individual budgets), and willingness to work with customers on flexible payment schedules. They maintain a 5/5 star rating across 6,991 verified reviews on Google, Facebook, and Endorsal. The application process is streamlined across three channels: phone, in-person, or online, with documented underwriting and rapid fund disbursement.

A key caveat is that Payment 1 is a for-profit lender offering personal and title loans—products that typically carry higher interest rates than bank loans. While the website mentions "competitive rates," no specific APR ranges are disclosed, making rate comparison impossible from available information. Title loan reliance on vehicle collateral carries repossession risk if payments are missed. The company's emergence in 2021 means limited long-term track record compared to established lenders.
address: 249 N Douglas Blvd, Midwest City, OK 73130

company_info.headquarters: 249 N Douglas Blvd, Midwest City, OK 73130

pros: Offers both personal installment loans and title loans from a single branch
Same-day or next-day funding available via check or direct debit card deposit
Flexible payment schedules designed to accommodate customer budgets
Physical branch location allows in-person consultation and document review
Accepts online applications without requiring office visit
Maintains 5/5 star rating across 6,991 verified customer reviews
Clear, documented process with stated requirements and timeline
cons: No APR, rate range, or fee schedule disclosed on website—rates are unknown
Title loans require vehicle lien placement, creating repossession risk
Requires 5 personal references as part of application, which may be burdensome
Company established only in May 2021—limited track record compared to established lenders
Saturday hours limited to 9:00 AM–1:00 PM; closed Sunday
best_for: Midwest City residents with unexpected expenses or emergencies needing $1K–$50K
Vehicle owners seeking quick cash via title loans while retaining use of their car
Borrowers seeking to build credit history through on-time installment payments
Customers preferring local, personalized service over online-only lenders
diagnosis: Payment 1 is best for Midwest City residents needing quick personal loans ($1K–$50K) or emergency title loans who value local service and flexible payments. The primary caveat: no interest rates or fees are disclosed online, making it impossible to assess actual cost; borrowers must contact the company directly. Title loan customers should understand repossession risk if payments lapse.
services: Personal installment loans for emergencies and unexpected expenses
Title loans using vehicle equity as collateral
In-person branch consultations and document review
Vehicle valuation and assessment for title loans
Same-day or next-day fund disbursement via check or debit card
Credit building through installment loan reporting
Vehicle title lien placement and removal services
Customer support via phone (405-737-2900) and email (mwc@payment1.com)
